CustomField.description: AI confidence score (0–100%) for the litigation risk score computed by NEPA_Litigation_Risk_Scorer. Reflects the fraction of the four scoring factors (review type, agency, circuit, adjacent statutes) that resolved to explicit CMT records rather than defaults. 100% = all four factors matched explicit records. Required by OMB M-24-10: structured confidence metadata must accompany all AI-scored risk outputs.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Confidence in litigation risk score. Lower values mean more scoring factors fell back to defaults.
CustomField.label: Litigation Risk AI Confidence
